summary: NodeInvocationAdapter with LOCAL/DEPLOYED/AUTO runtime backends implemented in omnibase_infra#1664. All nodes can execute via in-memory event bus when Kafka runtime is unavailable. Evidence keys carried in every dispatch result.

checks.evidence: src/omnibase_infra/enums/enum_runtime_backend.py — new file in PR omnibase_infra#1664, exported from enums/__init__.py

checks.description: NodeInvocationAdapter dispatches via in-memory bus when Kafka is down
checks.evidence: src/omnibase_infra/runtime/node_invocation_adapter.py — AUTO mode probes health_check, falls back to LOCAL in-memory EventBusInmemory when unhealthy or when health_check raises

checks.description: ModelLocalStateStore + ModelLocalStateStoreEntry typed state store for local runtime path
checks.evidence: src/omnibase_infra/runtime/models/model_local_state_store.py and model_local_state_store_entry.py — two files (one model per file per arch validator), commands persisted with command:topic:cid key
NodeInvocationAdapter._dispatch_local() returns dict with all evidence keys; 22 unit tests assert each key

checks.description: Non-delegation node (chain_orchestrator) also works via local runtime — platform-level coverage
Integration tests prove local fallback end-to-end with simulated Kafka down
checks.evidence: tests/integration/test_node_invocation_adapter_local_fallback.py — 5 tests: _KafkaDownBus (health returns unhealthy), _KafkaExceptionBus (health raises), chain_orchestrator path, explicit LOCAL backend, state store auditability. All 5 pass.

checks.description: 22 unit tests + 5 integration tests pass; mypy --strict clean; pre-commit clean
checks.evidence: uv run pytest tests/unit/runtime/test_node_invocation_adapter.py: 22 passed. uv run pytest tests/integration/test_node_invocation_adapter_local_fallback.py: 5 passed.
